summary: Iteration 17: Student Portal (My Academics) - Backend 100% (19/19 tests passed), Frontend 100% verified. All student portal features working correctly including GPA, grades, subject averages, attendance, schedule, and discipline.

issues: Minor: React warning about duplicate key 'NxAnnouncement' in player navigation (line 142-144 has Home and Announcements both pointing to NxAnnouncement)

critical_code_review_comments: Student Portal page correctly displays all academic data for logged-in student
Top stats show GPA (2.47), Total Grades (25), Attendance Rate (95.7%), Discipline count (1)
Grades section shows subject averages (Biology 81.6%, English 77.2%, Mathematics 80.2%, Physical Education 79.2%, US History 77.6%)
Individual grades display with assignment name, subject, date, percentage, and letter grade with color coding
Attendance section shows summary counts (22 Present, 1 Absent, 0 Late, 0 Excused) and recent records
Schedule section shows 6 classes with subject, day, room, and times
Discipline section shows 1 record with type (warning), description, and status (Active)
Collapsible sections work correctly (click to expand/collapse)
Player navigation includes 'My Academics' link that routes to StudentPortal
Non-student users (coach, teacher) get empty data from /api/students/my-portal (correct behavior)
/my-portal route is correctly placed BEFORE /{student_id} in students.py to avoid route conflicts

backend_endpoints.GET /api/students/my-portal (student): ✓ Returns complete student data with grades, GPA, attendance, schedule, discipline

data_verification.grades: ✓ 25 grades across 5 subjects (Mathematics, Biology, English, US History, Physical Education)
data_verification.subject_averages: ✓ 5 subjects with averages (Biology 81.6%, English 77.2%, Mathematics 80.2%, Physical Education 79.2%, US History 77.6%)
data_verification.attendance_summary: ✓ 23 total records, 22 present, 1 absent, 0 late, 0 excused, 95.7% rate
data_verification.attendance_recent: ✓ 20 recent records with dates and status
data_verification.schedule: ✓ 6 classes with subject, day, room, start/end times
data_verification.discipline: ✓ 1 record (warning - Disruptive behavior in class - Active)

frontend_features.page_title: ✓ 'My Academics' with student name and grade level
frontend_features.top_stats_cards: ✓ GPA, Total Grades, Attendance Rate, Discipline count
frontend_features.grades_section: ✓ Subject averages grid + individual grade rows with letter grades
frontend_features.schedule_section: ✓ Class schedule with teacher, room, day, times
frontend_features.discipline_section: ✓ Discipline records with type, description, status

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17: Student Portal (My Academics) complete. Students can view their academic data including GPA, grades with subject averages, attendance summary and recent records, class schedule, and discipline records. The /api/students/my-portal endpoint links user accounts to student records via email match. Marcus Johnson (marcus.j@lincoln.edu) has 25 grades, 23 attendance records (22 present + 1 absent = 95.7% rate), 6 class schedules, and 1 discipline record. Non-students get empty data from the endpoint. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
